analysis.name: Jito
analysis.summary: JTO近期因Jito生态扩展（JTX应用、交易所活动）和Solana生态热度上涨，但短期涨幅较大，需注意回调风险。

recommendation.invalidation: 跌破0.65美元或成交量萎缩

catalysts: Jito推出JTX应用及交易所活动（Bitget、Binance等）
Jito subDAO提案可能提升代币价值

latestNews.title: JTO price breakout explained: Why Jito is pumping and what lies ahead
latestNews.reason: 技术分析解读，但未提供新催化剂

fundamentals: Jito是Solana生态主要MEV和流动性质押协议
JTO为治理代币，用于协议治理和费用分配
总供应量10亿，流通约4.85亿，流通率48.5%
marketRead: 成交量约7840万美元，换手率较高
价格接近0.76美元，距离ATH 6.01美元仍跌87%
risks: 短期涨幅过大，存在获利回吐风险
市场情绪依赖Solana生态热度，若SOL回调可能拖累JTO
代币解锁压力：总供应量仍有约5.15亿未流通
新闻催化多为短期活动，持续性存疑
sourceNotes: Binance行情数据因地区限制无法获取，价格数据来自CoinGecko
新闻来源为Google News聚合，部分为预测类文章

profile.name: Jito
profile.description: JTO is the governance token of the Jito Network. Jito Network is a major contributor to the Solana ecosystem through its JitoSOL liquid staking pool, and its collection of MEV products. Users can exchange their SOL for JitoSOL. In return, holders maintain SOL’s liquidity and DeFi opportunities while earning yield from staking. JitoSOL uniquely provides its holders with additional rewards from transaction revenue associated with MEV extraction on Solana. Maximum extractable value (MEV) describes profit opportunities attributable to the specific order of transaction execution. For example, a large swap on Orca can lower the pool’s price below that of Raydium or Serum. Traders will race to profit from that price difference and this arbitrage is considered MEV. The Jito Foundation was created to minimize the negative impacts of MEV, equitably distribute the profits and increase transparency. Jito published an open source validator client designed to create a competitive market for MEV extraction. The client enables auctions within each block for the opportunity to capture that block’s MEV. Traders submit bids, and the highest bidders within each block can harvest available MEV.
